/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects CMakeFiles/test_ledis_storage_extended.dir/test_storage_extended.cpp.o -o /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/bin/test_ledis_storage_extended  ../../lib/libgtest_main.a /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/lib/libledis.a ../../lib/libgtest.a /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/lib/libzero.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libluajit-5.1.so -lpthread -ldl -lyaml-cpp
